title: Replace logo with cropped speaker logo and fix slogan positioning

requirements.summary: Replace the current logo in the Header component with the cropped speaker logo image served as a static asset
acceptanceCriteria: The speaker logo with gradient text and speaker icon is displayed in the header
The logo image is served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
The logo replaces any existing logo or placeholder in the Header component

file_operations.description: Replace the existing logo implementation with an element that references the generated cropped speaker logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/speaker-logo.dim_800x200.png. Remove or update any existing logo text/SVG with this static asset reference. Ensure appropriate alt text and styling for the logo image.

requirements.summary: Position the slogan text below the header separator line while maintaining proximity to the logo
acceptanceCriteria: The slogan appears completely below the header separator line with no overlap
Visual spacing between the logo and slogan remains minimal
The header separator line is clearly visible and unobstructed

file_operations.description: Adjust the slogan positioning to ensure it appears completely below the header separator line without overlapping it. Use CSS spacing utilities or layout adjustments to position the slogan below the separator while keeping visual proximity to the logo minimal. Ensure the separator line remains fully visible and unobstructed by the slogan text.
